text:
Morrissey (モリシ, Morishi) is the Grand Chamberlain for King Nasubi. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 376 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On the third day of the voyage, Halkenburg approaches a checkpoint with several of his guards. The guard behind the gate apologizes and says that he cannot see the King, asking him to wait until the next banquet. Halkenburg tells him that it's not soon enough and asks him to at least give his father a letter, handing the envelope to him. The guard informs him that he can only give the letter to Morrissey, the Grand Chamberlain, advising Halkenburg to give the letter directly to the King at the banquet. Halkenburg then tells the guard that he will come again tomorrow with the letter and will keep coming until his father sees him.
